steps: %s %s Master mix 1x H2O 13,3 5x Colorless Reaction Buffer (Promega, #M3005) 4 10mM dNTPs (ThermoFisher, #R0182) 0,4 Fw primer (CMV FW) 0,6 Rv primer (BGH RV) 0,6 GoTaq Polymerase (Promega, #M3005) 0,1 Σ 19µl Mix 19 µL MM with 1 µL DNA ( 50 ng ).
Add 50 µL sodium acetate ( 1 mL 3 Molarity (M) Na Acetate (Carl Roth) + 24 mL 100% EtOH (VWR Chemicals BDH Prolabo)) to 20 µL PCR product.
Mix well and centrifuge at 3200 rcf, 4 °C, 45 minutes .
Centrifuge upside down max. 600 rcf, 4 °C, 1 minute (top of sample down on tissue paper) to remove EtOH.
Add 15 µL MilliQ-H2O to pellet and vortex 15-20 min (speed 0-1).
%s %s 1xsample H2O 5,3µl 5x Terminator Sequencing buffer 3,3µl BigDye v3.1 (ThermoFisher, #4337455) 1,4µl Σ 10µl Add 5 µL MM.
Add 1 µL primer FW or RV.
Add 25 µL sodium acetate to 10 µL PCR product from.
Mix well and centrifuge at 3200 rcf, 4 °C, 45 minutes .
Centrifuge upside down max. 600 rcf, 4 °C, 1 minute (top of sample down on tissue paper) to remove EtOH.
Add 15 µL MilliQ-H 2 O to pellet and vortex 15-20min (speed 0-1). Note : COVER! Light sensitive!
